page_content:
Restriction: Permission of EDUC-College of Education.

Credit Only Granted for. EDUC769, EDHI788M, or EDUC770.

Formerly: EDHI788M.

EDUC773 Seminar in School Finance and Resource Management (4 Credits)

Issues related to financing and resource management in US K-12 public education systems will be investigated including how various levels of government support public education, and the revenue-generating tools they use. A major theme throughout the course will be on how the values and concepts of educational equity drive the distribution of revenue to schools and how to use data to create . a school-level resourcing plan that provides access and opportunities to learning for every student. Prerequisite: Permission of instructor.
